name: Medical_Examination_Checkbox_Page
description/Note: Page containing checkbox-style Yes/No medical questions arranged in a table with 'Yes/Ya' and 'No/Tidak' column headers. Each question has two small square checkbox boxes (left=Yes, right=No) and a DETAILS column on the far right for handwritten notes.

name: Medical_Examination_Measurements
description/Note: Page or section containing physical measurements such as height (cm), weight (kg), visual acuity, blood pressure readings, pulse rate, urine analysis, and other biometric data.

name: Medical_Examination_Details
description/Note: Page or section containing narrative findings, examiner opinions, medical history details, and handwritten clinical notes. Often in the 'DETAILS' column or a dedicated findings area.

name: Medical_Examination_Declaration
description/Note: Page with examiner declaration, certification, signature, medical registration number, and date of examination.

name: Medical_History_Questions
description/Note: Page containing applicant medical history questions about past diseases, hospitalizations, surgeries, and family history, typically answered via Yes/No checkboxes.
